scope: Headless GUT shutdown after all project tests. Raw counts include Godot-held global script classes; they may only be recalibrated after an audited pinned GF vendor-tree or project runtime class-set change, and must not grow while both inputs remain unchanged.
calibration_reason: The audited tile-identity overhaul adds TileShapeSurface, TileVisualFamilyStyle, and TileVisualTheme as three intentional project runtime script classes. The complete 278-test Godot 4.7/GUT run remained within the reviewed ObjectDB, Resource, and RID limits, so only the declared project class-set count changes from 173 to 176.
